CVE-2020-13574.title: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Security plugi ...
CVE-2020-13574.summary: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Security plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to denial of service. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-13575.summary: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to denial of service. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-13576.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin ...
CVE-2020-13576.summary: A code execution vulnerability exists in the WS-Addressing plugin functionality of Genivia gSOAP 2.8.107. A specially crafted SOAP request can lead to remote code execution. An attacker can send an HTTP request to trigger this vulnerability.
